compiled_state.title: Structural test: completion-verifier.md contains PRECONDITIONS instruction section
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Objective
Write a structural boundary test that verifies `completion-verifier.md` contains a PRECONDITIONS reading instruction section. Per the behavioral testing standard Rule 5, LLM instruction files are tested at the structural boundary (section presence), not for content accuracy. This test is GREEN (no behavioral content) — no RED-first dependency required.

## Test File to Create
`tests/scripts/test-completion-verifier-preconditions.sh` (new)

## .test-index entry required (non-fuzzy-matchable name)
- `plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md: tests/scripts/test-completion-verifier-preconditions.sh [test_completion_verifier_has_preconditions_section]`

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)

**test_completion_verifier_has_preconditions_section:**
- Given: the `completion-verifier.md` file exists at `plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md`
- When: the file is read
- Then: the file contains a section heading matching `## .*PRECONDITIONS` or the string "PRECONDITIONS" appears in a step/procedure context (not just a passing mention)

Note: This test will fail until T10 adds the PRECONDITIONS section to completion-verifier.md. Write it as a test that should be RED until T10 completes, then GREEN after.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/scripts/test-completion-verifier-preconditions.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-completion-verifier-preconditions.sh
- [ ] `test_completion_verifier_has_preconditions_section` function exists in the test file
  Verify: grep -q "test_completion_verifier_has_preconditions_section" tests/scripts/test-completion-verifier-preconditions.sh
- [ ] Test fails before T10 (PRECONDITIONS section not yet in completion-verifier.md)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-completion-verifier-preconditions.sh test_completion_verifier_has_preconditions_section 2>&1 | grep -qiE "FAIL|not found"
- [ ] .test-index entry added for test mapping
  Verify: grep -q "completion-verifier.md" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
